Frequently Asked Questions
Why the Right Mattress Matters—Especially the H Performance® Mattress

settings.content: Most people underestimate just how much their mattress impacts their sleep performance. Sleep isn’t just about hours logged—it’s about how well your body recovers overnight. From spinal alignment and pressure relief to temperature regulation and motion control, your mattress plays a direct role in how refreshed you feel every morning.
The BEDGEAR H Performance® Mattress is designed to address the most common sleep disruptors and turn rest into real recovery.

settings.quote: The motion isolation is strong so that it doesn’t feel like an overt earthquake when winding down to sleep or with things moving and shaking. The firmness level is also quite supportive, especially for those of different body types.

settings.text: The Key Factors That Define Performance Sleep
Temperature Regulation

settings.content: Overheating is one of the leading causes of disrupted sleep. When your body temperature rises, it becomes harder to stay in deep and REM sleep cycles.

The H Performance® Mattress is engineered with breathable materials and airflow-focused construction to help regulate your core temperature throughout the night—so you fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer.

settings.text: Support & Pressure Relief

settings.content: A poorly fitted mattress can lead to pressure points, back pain, and restless nights. The right level of firmness and support is critical, especially for different body types and sleep positions.
The H Performance® Mattress delivers balanced, responsive support that helps keep your spine properly aligned while reducing pressure on key areas like shoulders and hips.

settings.text: Motion Isolation

settings.content: Sharing a bed shouldn’t mean feeling every toss, turn, or late-night movement.
The H Performance® Mattress features strong motion isolation, minimizing sleep disturbances so movement on one side of the bed doesn’t feel like an earthquake on the other.

settings.text: Durability That Performs Over Time

settings.content: Performance sleep isn’t possible on a sagging or worn-out mattress. Loss of support leads to poor airflow, pressure buildup, and inconsistent comfort.
The H Performance® Mattress is built with high-quality materials designed to maintain structure, support, and airflow night after night—year after year.

settings.text: What Sets BEDGEAR Apart

settings.content: Add your Every body is different. That’s why BEDGEAR offers multiple comfort levels—from softer to firmer—so you can choose what works best for your sleep style and body type.
For couples, dual-comfort options ensure both partners get the support they need without compromise.paragraph, lists, and links here.
BEDGEAR mattresses use moisture-wicking, breathable fabrics and airflow-enhancing layers to prevent heat buildup. The result? A cooler, drier sleep environment that supports uninterrupted rest.

We call it performance sleep for a reason. The H Performance® Mattress is built to help athletes, professionals, and parents alike recover faster, wake up with more energy, and reduce morning grogginess.
Forget mattresses that lose their shape after a few years. BEDGEAR mattresses are engineered for long-term durability, ensuring consistent comfort, support, and cooling performance over time.

settings.text: Frequently Asked Questions

settings.question: What type of sleeper is the H Performance Mattress best for?
settings.answer: The H Performance Mattress is ideal for combination sleepers, side sleepers, and back sleepers who want a balance of pressure relief and support. Its hybrid construction adapts quickly when you change positions, making it especially popular among people who toss and turn at night.

settings.question: How does the hybrid design improve sleep compared to all-foam mattresses?
settings.answer:
Hybrid mattresses combine the pressure-relieving comfort of foam with the support and airflow of individually wrapped coils. Compared to all-foam mattresses, the H Performance Mattress offers:

  • Better temperature regulation
  • Enhanced edge support
  • More responsive bounce and movement ease
  • Improved long-term durability

settings.question: What are the differences and benefits between hybrid mattresses and memory foam mattresses?
settings.answer: Hybrid mattresses combine memory foam, or other types of foams, and coils giving you the ultimate balance of comfort and support. Memory foam mattresses provide conforming pressure relief for a deeper more restful sleep.

settings.question: Does the mattress provide enough support for heavier sleepers?
settings.answer: Absolutely. The H Performance Mattress features a reinforced coil system that provides consistent support across the entire sleep surface. This helps prevent sagging and makes the mattress suitable for a wide range of body types while maintaining comfort and spinal alignment.

settings.question: Will I feel my partner move during the night?
settings.answer: Minimal motion transfer is one of the key benefits of the H Performance Mattress. The individually wrapped coils and responsive foams help isolate movement, making it a great choice for couples or light sleepers who are easily disturbed.

settings.question: Who should choose the H Performance Mattress?
settings.answer:
The H Performance Mattress is a great choice if you:

  • Want a balanced feel (not too soft, not too firm)
  • Sleep hot or want better airflow
  • Share your bed with a partner
  • Prefer easier movement and responsiveness
  • Want long-lasting support without sacrificing comfort
